title: Český Krumlov, South Bohemia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Český Krumlov, South Bohemia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Český Krumlov is a city in South Bohemia with a population of 13,000. A UNESCO World Heritage fairy-tale town in South Bohemia, with a stunning castle complex and perfectly preserved medieval old town.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
